title: viola × savatieri
intro: Viola × savatieri, also known as the hybrid viola, is a cross between the common viola and the yellow viola, resulting in a unique and visually appealing plant with vibrant purple and yellow flowers. The medicinal properties of Viola × savatieri include its analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause and PMS. Viola × savatieri can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
